title: Zoflora Lemon Zing Concentrated Multipurpose Disinfectant Spray, Antibacterial & Multi-Surface, Pet Safe Disinfectant, Kills 99.9% Of Bacteria & Viruses, 1 X 500 ml
features: BURSTING WITH FRAGRANCE: Zesty; Spicy; Sweet; a luxurious blend of lemon, ginger and grapefruit combine to create a fresh, uplifting fragrance for your home

KILLS 99.9 PERCENT OF VIRUSES & BACTERIA: The powerful and unique formula is designed to effectively eliminate 99.9 Percent of bacteria and viruses as Zoflora concentrated multipurpose disinfectant cleaner kills bacteria and viruses, helping to protect your family from potentially harmful germs, whilst also eliminating odours to leave homes beautifully fragrant all day

DIRECTIONS: Dilute and spray it, soak it, wipe it, mop it, or use it neat down drains and plugholes; Zoflora is a versatile 3-in-1 multipurpose concentrated disinfectant designed for various cleaning applications; it can be used either neat or diluted in water, and 500ml of Zoflora can make almost 20L of full-strength disinfectant, offering a cost-effective and efficient cleaning solution

PATENTED TECHNOLOGY: Zoflora contains patented odour elimination technology, and our fragrances are tested to last at least 24 hours, leaving your home beautifully fragrant; our fragrances are crafted by expert perfumers with premium ingredients to bring luxurious scents to your home

MULTI-SURFACE CLEANING: Zoflora disinfectant can be used on hard surfaces throughout your home, including floors, baths, tiles, taps, worktops, dishcloths, and toilets, or neat down drains and plugholes, providing antibacterial protection

ALSO AVAILABLE IN: Explore a variety of perfumer-developed fragrances including Bouquet, Coastal Waves, Mountain Air, Lemon Zing, Linen Fresh, Midnight Blooms, Springtime, Sweet Pea offering a range of 500ML scents to suit your preference

EXPLORE THE ZOFLORA RANGE: Discover a diverse selection of captivating fragrances and specialized formulations within the Zoflora range, offering an array of choices to suit your cleaning needs; from bathroom cleaners that provide effective and hygienic cleaning to floor wipes that maintain cleanliness and freshness, and multi-purpose sprays that offer versatile cleaning solutions
description: Product Description Zoflora Concentrated Multipurpose Disinfectant Liquid kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses*, helping to protect your family from potentially harmful germs, whilst also eliminating odours to leave homes beautifully fragrant all day. Proudly Made in Yorkshire since 1922. With over 15 fragrances to choose from, Zoflora offers all day freshness and fills your home with a beautiful long lasting scent. Zoflora, the indulgently fragranced cleaning brand, has been beautifully cleaning homes for over 100 years offering a range of multipurpose and task-specific cleaning products. Dilute and Spray It, Soak It, Wipe It, Mop It, Zoflora can be used neat or diluted in water. 500ml of Zoflora makes almost 20L of full-strength disinfectant. Perfect for use on floors, baths, tiles, taps, worktops, dishcloths, toilets, or neat down drains and plugholes. Beautiful Perfumer developed fragrances: Lemon Zing is a a luxurious blend of lemon, ginger and grapefruit combined to create a fresh, uplifting fragrance for your home. Zoflora is also pet-friendly** and great for eliminating pet odours. Zoflora will neutralise pet urine odour whilst adding a fresh fragrant scent that will last for 24 hours. **Safe for use on hard surface pet areas when directions for use are followed and treated areas dried completely before your pet has access to it. Always follow on-pack product information to use Zoflora safely around your pets. *For effective disinfection wipe directly onto surfaces ensuring full coverage. To kill 99.9% of enveloped viruses and bacteria allow a contact time of 5 minutes. Viruses: Influenza - Type A (H1N1). Bacteria: E.coli, MRSA, Salmonella, Listeria. How much should I use? Dilute Zoflora Concentrated Multipurpose Disinfectant 1 to 40 with water. One capful (10ml) of any bottle size – 120ml/250ml/500ml – will make approximately 400ml of full-strength disinfectant. Zoflora Concentrated Multipurpose Disinfectant should be diluted 1 in 40 with water, and retains its germ killing power for 2 weeks from dilution. Zoflora can be used neat down toilet bowls, drains and plugholes to eliminate odours and kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria. Explore a variety of perfumer-developed fragrances including Bouquet, Coastal Waves, Mountain Air, Lemon Zing, Linen Fresh, Midnight Blooms, Springtime, Sweet Pea offering a range of 500ML scents to suit your preference Ingredients Zoflora contains amongst other ingredients; Benzalknium chloride (1.87%), concentrated perfume compound. Contains hexylcinnamaldehyde, linalool and delta-damascone. Manufacturer Contact Information Thornton & Ross Ltd., Huddersfield, HD7 5QH, UK See more
